Research in NLP, Robust Language Modeling, LLM and Model Safety, Low Ressource Languages and Specialized domains

Legacy downloads

This page was marked as outdated in the original site. It mainly documented older software releases and experimental tooling.

The archived content mentioned:

  • Febril — a Brill tagger front-end
  • Debil — an interface to the Xerox XLE parser for LFG
  • DependencyTag parser — early Prolog sources connected to PhD work

Because the external download links on the original page are old and may no longer be maintained, this section is kept mostly as an archival reference.
